content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Toptal: English Screener Anywhere in the World California All Other Remote Contract <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5068/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.toptal.com/">https://www.toptal.com/</a> </p> <div> <p>Summary:<br>Toptal is an exclusive network of the top freelance software developers, designers, finance experts, product managers, and project managers in the world. Top companies hire Toptal freelancers for their most important projects.</p> <p>We’re currently looking for a new member of our English Screening Team. In this hourly, remote engagement, you will serve as one of the first points of contact for applicants entering the Toptal network. Your ability to communicate clearly, assess candidates effectively, and create a positive experience will play a key role in maintaining Toptal’s high talent bar.</p> <p>Responsibilities:</p> <ul> <li>Conduct English screening assessments through live interviews and recorded video submissions, evaluating candidates’ English proficiency, professionalism, as well as their overall fit for the Toptal network</li> <li>Provide notes and documentation after each interview</li> <li>Guide candidates through the screening process and ensure a smooth and positive experience</li> <li>Collaborate with the team to ensure alignment on screening standards and processes</li> <li>Contribute to continuous improvement of screening workflows and candidate experience</li> </ul> <p>What to Expect:</p> <ul> <li>Engage with candidates from diverse professional backgrounds (developers, designers, finance experts, etc.)</li> <li>Represent Toptal as a first touchpoint, ensuring a strong and professional brand impression</li> <li>Work in a fast-paced, fully remote environment with a focus on efficiency and quality</li> <li>Handle multiple screenings per day while maintaining high evaluation standards</li> <li>Work under an hourly engagement structure</li> <li>Workload may vary, but you can generally expect up to 8 hours of work per day depending on team needs and your availability</li> </ul> <p>Availability:</p> <ul> <ul> <li>Ability to commit to a consistent schedule&nbsp;</li> <li>Flexibility to cover key time zones (APAC, EU and US time zones)</li> <li>Availability to support an hourly engagement model, with capacity to work up to 8 hours per day as needed</li> </ul> </ul> </div> <h2>Requirements</h2> <div> <p>&nbsp;</p> <ul> <li>Excellent written and verbal English communication skills</li> <li>Strong interpersonal and interviewing skills</li> <li>Experience conducting interviews or candidate assessments is preferred</li> <li>Comfortable handling video calls and engaging with global candidates</li> <li>Highly organized with strong time management skills</li> <li>Ability to work independently and manage workload effectively</li> <li>Comfortable using tools such as Slack and other collaboration platforms</li> <li>Experience in remote work environments is a plus</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>Preferred Qualifications:</p> <ul> <li>Background in recruitment, HR, BPO, or talent operations</li> <li>Experience working with international candidates</li> <li>Familiarity with screening or evaluation frameworks</li> </ul> </div> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a Requires U.S. Central Time core hours.)</p><p><strong>Job Type:</strong> Full-time</p><p><strong>About Us:<br></strong>jProg develops innovative software solutions in the HIV public health space, with a deep commitment to improving health outcomes through technology.</p><p>Our flagship platform, CAREWare, is a secure, three-tier web application used by hundreds of State, City/County health departments and major ambulatory HIV clinics. CAREWare includes:</p><ul><li><p>A custom HTTP service written in Go</p></li><li><p>A large business tier written in VB.NET</p></li><li><p>A Microsoft SQL Server data tier</p></li><li><p>A sophisticated JavaScript/AJAX presentation layer</p></li></ul><p>The business tier contains over one million lines of code supporting features such as federal reporting, custom reporting engines, FHIR integrations, clinical coding, user/provider management, and security controls.</p><p>We are seeking a talented and dedicated software developer to join our team. Our ideal candidate is someone who excels in a dynamic, collaborative environment, and is ready to contribute to projects impacting significant health initiatives with strong skills in the following areas:</p><p><strong>Key Responsibilities:</strong></p><ul><li><p>Develop and maintain high-quality software applications.</p></li><li><p>Collaborate effectively with team members and clients to understand project requirements and deliver robust solutions.</p></li><li><p>Successfully take direction and execute tasks within an Agile environment.</p></li><li><p>Communicate progress, challenges, and solutions clearly both within the team and with clients.</p></li><li><p>Provide exceptional customer service and support when needed.</p></li><li><p>Participate in code reviews and contribute to continuous improvement practices.</p></li></ul><p><strong>Required Qualifications:</strong></p><ul><li><p>Ability to successfully clear a comprehensive criminal background check (required by client contracts).</p></li><li><p>Minimum of <strong>3–5 years of professional software development experience</strong> in a production environment.</p></li><li><p>Demonstrated ability to <strong>design, build, and maintain scalable applications</strong> with limited supervision.</p></li><li><p>Strong communication skills with both technical a
